channel.title: Graphrag on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Graphrag on Junho Lee

item.title: 0. DataNexus Architecture Overview
item.description: From natural language input to result — the full DataNexus flow built on DozerDB, Vanna AI, ApeRAG, and DataHub

item.title: 1. Why We're Building DataNexus
item.description: The structural problems with enterprise data analytics, and why we decided to build an ontology-based data agent platform.
